title: Roblox
notes: To make Roblox work better for you, we deliver updates regularly. These updates include bug fixes and improvements for speed and reliability.

title: Free Fire: Undersea Mystery
notes:
[Undersea Realm] Dive into the seabed in Bermuda and fight underwater! Try out the event weapon Hydro Blaster.
[New Character - Ray] Link to a target and knock them down when they're low on HP. A takedown resets the skill.  
[CS Random Events] Bigger starting funds, free Gloo Walls, and other random events shake up CS!
[Quick Messages] Smarter auto-trigger messages and pings for clearer comms.
[Pyro] Keep your fiery new companion active to level them up and unlock outfits.
